notes: Phase 4 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Arms Warrior gear guide (anchor phase-5-tier-10-best-in-slot — Icy Veins' "Phase 5" is our combined p4). Tier set: Sanctified Ymirjar Lord's line. Back slot is a faction-specific Trial of the Crusader tribute-chest cloak (Alliance: Vereesa's Dexterity, Horde: Sylvanas' Cunning) — both equivalent. Weapon is the legendary Shadowmourne (obtained via a long ICC questline, not a boss drop). Enchants/gems reused across all WotLK melee-Str DPS specs.

items.name: Vereesa's Dexterity (Alliance) / Sylvanas' Cunning (Horde)
items.source: Trial of the Crusader 25 Heroic — Argent Crusade Tribute Chest

items.name: Shadowmourne (Legendary)
items.source: obtained via a multi-stage Icecrown Citadel questline

enchants.name: Arcanum of Torment
enchants.source: Knights of the Ebon Blade — Revered

enchants.name: Greater Inscription of the Axe
enchants.source: Sons of Hodir — Exalted (Master's Inscription of the Axe for scribes)

enchants.name: Enchant Bracers — Greater Assault
enchants.source: Enchanting (Fur Lining — Attack Power for leatherworkers)

enchants.name: Enchant Gloves — Crusher
enchants.source: Enchanting (Precision if missing hit; Hyperspeed Accelerators for engineers)

enchants.name: Icescale Leg Armor
enchants.source: Leatherworking (crafted, usable by all; Nerubian Leg Reinforcements for leatherworkers)

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage — meta requirements must be met)
Fractured Cardinal Ruby (+23 crit) — or Bold Cardinal Ruby (+23 Str)
Inscribed Ametrine / Etched Ametrine (Str+crit or Str+hit) — or Rigid King's Amber (+16 crit) for socket bonus
Nightmare Tear (activates the meta gem by itself)
